checks.summary: The root, shared preference source, and every llm-gateway-backed role explicitly disable provider-hosted web search while the required CentralCloud MCP gateway remains configured.
The mutable preference updater applies web_search=disabled without losing unrelated root or table values.
The VCS contract, Codex preference tests, hosted-search contract, and Home Manager activation-package build passed.
Purpose, WorkSpec, admission, handover, snapshot, and derived-requirement gates passed.
Home Manager activated the exact isolated-worktree generation.

checks.summary: The fresh auto-fast subagent completed multiple Responses turns and the deployed gateway logged HTTP 200 instead of the former tools[30] HTTP 422 conversion failure.

remaining_findings.summary: The new worker reached the model successfully, but neither its spawn task nor follow-up task appeared in the worker rollout and it acted on unrelated context. This is separate from hosted-search request conversion.
